name: Capt. (Dr.) Pratiksha Tripathi (Retd.)
description: My mom. With over 10 years of experience in psychological counseling and career guidance, Dr. Pratiksha brings in a unique perspective shaped by her distinguished military service. She's a licensed counselor by the Rehabilitation Council of India, and specializes in anxiety management, career decisions and transitions, and relationship counseling. She said she wanted to be at the top of this list, so here she is. <3
